name: Hummus Me Tahini (Chick Pea Salad with Tahini)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chick-peas, then soak overnight with the baking soda in cold water to cover.
2. The following day, drain and wash the chick-peas, then cover with fresh water. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer until tender, 1-1/2 to 2 hours.
3. Drain and push through sieve or food mill, discarding the coarse fibers remaining in the sieve.
4. Meanwhile, put the Tahini in a small bowl and beat it with the 1/3 cup water until dissolved, using a whisk or fork.
5. Beating briskly with the whisk, add the Tahini mixture, a teaspoonful at a time, to the chick-peas, alternating with the lemon juice and olive oil.
6. When all has been added, crush the garlic over the mixture and sprinkle with optional spices, salt, pepper, and 1 tablespoon chopped parsley.
7. Beat for another minute, then taste for seasonings and chill overnight if possible.
8. Serve cold, sprinkled with additional chopped parsley. Makes about 2 cups.
